title: Minimum Spanning Tree (Kruskal)
description: Find minimum spanning tree using Kruskal's algorithm
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start: Input Graph G(V,E) with Weighted Edges] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1[Create a set of edges EdgesList] style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1[EdgesList = All Edges from G(V,E)] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1[Sort EdgesList by Weight (Ascending)] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1[Initialize MST = {} (Empty Set)] style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1[Initialize NumVertices = |V|] style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 G1[Initialize NumEdgesInMST = 0] style G1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff H1[Create Disjoint Sets for Each Vertex in V] style H1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 I1[For Each Vertex v in V: MakeSet(v)] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1[Edge = First Edge in Sorted EdgesList] style J1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff K1{{"NumEdgesInMST < NumVertices - 1"}} style K1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff L1[(u, v) = Edge] style L1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff M1[Find(u)] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff N1[Find(v)] style N1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff O1{{"Find(u) != Find(v)"}} style O1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff P1[MST = MST + {Edge}] style P1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff Q1[Union(u, v)] style Q1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff R1[NumEdgesInMST = NumEdgesInMST + 1] style R1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff S1[Remove Edge from EdgesList] style S1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff T1[EdgesList is Empty?] style T1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff U1[Select Next Edge from EdgesList] style U1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff V1[Return MST] style V1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff W1[End] style W1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff A1 --> B1 B1 --> C1 C1 --> D1 D1 --> E1 E1 --> F1 F1 --> H1 H1 --> I1 I1 --> G1 G1 --> J1 J1 --> K1 K1 -- Yes --> L1 L1 --> M1 M1 --> N1 N1 --> O1 O1 -- Yes --> P1 P1 --> Q1 Q1 --> R1 R1 --> S1 S1 --> U1 U1 --> K1 O1 -- No --> S1 K1 -- No --> V1 S1 --> T1 T1 -- Yes --> V1 T1 -- No --> U1 V1 --> W1
